meaning: n.少女身份,少女们,少女时代
examples: Her girlhood dream had been to study painting.
She had shared responsibility for her brother since girlhood.
On one of her solitary girlhood walks, she once found herself accompanied by a lightning ball.
But they are wise not to say so around a fan, especially one nostalgic for her Kitty-infused girlhood.
It begins with a girlhood of baton twirling and barrel racing in rodeos.
